'''Di'wor''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that was located in [[Di'wor system/Legends|Di'wor system]], in the [[Morshdine sector/Legends|Morshdine sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. The planet's [[singfruit]] groves' pollination season attracted many tourists.

[[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] tracked the [[Cavrilhu Pirates]] that were fleeing their [[Kauron]] asteroid base to this planet before losing them completely.

==Behind the scenes==
Di'wor is likely a shortened form of [[Wikipedia:Disney World|Disney World]] due to the fact that [[StarSpeeder 3000s]] were seen operating on the planet. The ships originated from Disney's [[Star Tours (real-world)|Star Tours]] ride.

==Appearances==
*''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
